title: millefolium
intro: Millefolium, also known as yarrow, is a perennial herb with a fern-like appearance, characterized by its delicate leaves and clusters of small white or yellow flowers. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and relieving digestive issues. The health benefits of yarrow include its ability to reduce menstrual cramps, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. Yarrow can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote healing and prevent infection.
